title: MechaMew2 [cobblemon]
description: A mechanized Mewtwo engineered for perfection
body:
# MechaMew2 [Cobblemon] The cybernetic Mewtwo from Pokémon Live! — a perfect machine built to learn every TM and conquer. ⚠️ **IMPORTANT:** - Requires **Mega Showdown** to function properly due to custom moves and abilities. - Must be installed in both the **datapack** and **resourcepack** folders. - **Craft in Resurrection Machine with nether star, upgrade and metal coat** ---
📥 Installation Instructions **Singleplayer:** - Place the `.zip` file into `/saves/[WORLDNAME]/datapacks` - Place the `.zip` into `/resourcepacks` - Enable in-game via `ESC → Options → Resource Packs` **Servers:** - Place the `.zip` into `/world/datapacks` - (Folder name may differ — e.g., `myworld` or custom) - If unsure, consult your host’s guide on adding datapacks. **Every Player** must also have the `.zip` installed as a **Resource Pack**. - Best practice: each player installs it manually. - You *can* use a server resource pack, but Cobblemon add-ons can be finicky with that.
---
⚔️ Base Stats & Typing **Name:** MechaMew2 **Typing:** Steel / Psychic **Base Stats (BST 780):** - HP : 110 - Attack : 160 - Defense : 140 - Special Attack : 160 - Special Defense : 110 - Speed : 100
---
🌟 Custom Abilities - **Failsafe Core** – A built-in emergency system that boosts all stats when damaged. At critical health, MechaMew2’s core overloads, unleashing a final strike that takes down its foe along with itself. - **Hidden:Apex Supremacy** – MechaMew2’s apex systems optimize in battle, boosting all stats and granting immunity to status effects. When HP drops below half, it fully restores itself and enters Apex Overdrive, massively amplifying every stat.
---
🔥 Custom Moves * **Apex Tail Whip** – The apex version of Tail Whip. Strikes the foe while lowering both Defense and Special Defense. * **Apex Growl** – The apex version of Growl. Reduces the target’s Attack and forces them to switch out. * **Apex Poison Smokescreen** – The apex version of Smokescreen. Poisons the foe and lowers their accuracy. * **Apex Scary Look** – The apex version of Scary Face and Mean Look combined. Sharply lowers Speed and prevents escape. * **Apex Splash** – The apex version of Splash. Converts hydraulic force into real damage, hitting 2–5 times with a chance to slow the foe. * **Apex Twister** – The apex version of Twister. Strikes all opponents with draconic energy and always causes flinching. * **Apex Acid Fang** – The apex version of Acid Spray and Poison Fang. Has a high chance to poison and lowers both Defense and Special Defense. * **Aegis Protocol** – Deploys a psychic defense barrier that halves damage and reflects it back at double power. * **Critical Override** – A precision Steel strike that always lands a critical hit, bypassing armor completely. * **Apex Cannon** – The apex version of Hyper Beam and Flash Cannon. A devastating Steel beam used once per battle, damaging both foe and user. * **Data Breaker** – A precision Electric strike that detects and destabilizes boosted systems, removing one of the foe’s stat increases before dealing damage. * **Data Drain** – Absorbs a random stat from the opponent, lowering it by 1 and transferring the boost to MechaMew2. * **Neuroclasm** – A psychic storm that strikes 3–6 times. Each hit has a 20% chance to lower one of the foe’s stats. * **Neuron Scramble** – Overloads the opponent’s neural systems, disabling their last used move for 10 turns. * **Quantum Singularity** – Generates a psychic gravity field that traps and damages the foe for 4–5 turns. * **Reality Desync** – A spectral field that shatters perception, lowering accuracy and disabling critical hits for 5 turns. * **Synapse Flare** – A powerful Psychic blast that breaks through Protect and Substitutes, but lowers one of MechaMew2’s stats afterward. * **Synaptic Feedback** – A reactive psychic strike that doubles in power if the foe attacked last turn. * **System Purge** – Burns away corrupted system data, cleansing MechaMew2’s status and always burning the opponent. * **Tri-Phase Cannon** – Fires three psychic bursts in sequence — each with a chance to Confuse, Flinch, or lower the target’s Special Defense.
---
